revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Serbia and Montenegro]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Serbia and Montenegro]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: use AWB to add navy variant
1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Serbia and Montenegro | flag alias = Flag of Yugoslavia (1992–2003); Flag of Serbia and Montenegro (2003–2006).svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | link alias-naval = Navy of Serbia and Montenegro | link alias-air force = Air Force of Serbia and Montenegro | flag alias-air force=Fin Marking of FR Yugoslav Air Force.svg | link alias-army = Ground Forces of Serbia and Montenegro | link alias-military = Armed Forces of Serbia and Montenegro | border-air force= | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | link alias-navy = Navy of Serbia and Montenegro | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | redir1 = SCG | related1 = Serbia | related2 = Montenegro | related3 = FR Yugoslavia </noinclude> }} [[Category:New]]

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Serbia and Montenegro | flag alias = Flag of Yugoslavia (1992–2003); Flag of Serbia and Montenegro (2003–2006).svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | link alias-naval = Navy of Serbia and Montenegro | link alias-air force = Air Force of Serbia and Montenegro | flag alias-air force=Fin Marking of FR Yugoslav Air Force.svg | link alias-army = Ground Forces of Serbia and Montenegro | link alias-military = Armed Forces of Serbia and Montenegro | border-air force= | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | link alias-navy = Navy of Serbia and Montenegro | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | redir1 = SCG | related1 = Serbia | related2 = Montenegro | related3 = FR Yugoslavia </noinclude> }} <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Serbia and Montenegro | flag alias = Flag of Yugoslavia (1992–2003); Flag of Serbia and Montenegro (2003–2006).svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | link alias-naval = Navy of Serbia and Montenegro | link alias-air force = Air Force of Serbia and Montenegro | flag alias-air force=Fin Marking of FR Yugoslav Air Force.svg | link alias-army = Ground Forces of Serbia and Montenegro | link alias-military = Armed Forces of Serbia and Montenegro | border-air force= | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | link alias-navy = Navy of Serbia and Montenegro | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | redir1 = SCG | related1 = Serbia | related2 = Montenegro | related3 = FR Yugoslavia </noinclude> }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Serbia and Montenegro | flag alias = Flag of Yugoslavia (1992–2003); Flag of Serbia and Montenegro (2003–2006).svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | link alias-naval = Navy of Serbia and Montenegro | link alias-air force = Air Force of Serbia and Montenegro | flag alias-air force=Fin Marking of FR Yugoslav Air Force.svg | link alias-army = Ground Forces of Serbia and Montenegro | link alias-military = Armed Forces of Serbia and Montenegro | border-air force= | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | link alias-navy = Navy of Serbia and Montenegro | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | redir1 = SCG | related1 = Serbia | related2 = Montenegro | related3 = FR Yugoslavia </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Serbia_and_Montenegro here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Serbia_and_Montenegro for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Serbia and Montenegro | flag alias = Flag of Yugoslavia (1992–2003); Flag of Serbia and Montenegro (2003–2006).svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | link alias-naval = Navy of Serbia and Montenegro | link alias-air force = Air Force of Serbia and Montenegro | flag alias-air force=Fin Marking of FR Yugoslav Air Force.svg | link alias-army = Ground Forces of Serbia and Montenegro | link alias-military = Armed Forces of Serbia and Montenegro | border-air force= | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Serbia and Montenegro.svg | link alias-navy = Navy of Serbia and Montenegro | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | redir1 = SCG | related1 = Serbia | related2 = Montenegro | related3 = FR Yugoslavia </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
